description_long: This spice rack consists of a curved, transparent plastic holder containing six cylindrical yellow spice containers arranged side by side. The front of the rack is clear, allowing visibility of the spice containers, while the back features a colorful, abstract pattern, likely part of the packaging or a decorative insert. Each container has a rounded top and appears to be individually removable. The rack has a small handle or hanging slot at the top center, suggesting it can be easily carried or hung. The overall design is compact and practical, suitable for organizing spices in a kitchen or urban living space. The materials and finish give it a modern, clean appearance.
description: A curved transparent rack holds six yellow cylindrical spice containers, with a colorful backing and a central handle slot. The design is compact, modern, and practical for kitchen use.
description_view_0: Front view shows six yellow spice containers in a clear curved rack, with the tops of the containers visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the rack and the cylindrical shape of the containers, with only the edge of the rack and containers visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a colorful, abstract backing behind the containers, with the handle slot at the top center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and side profile of the containers and rack.
